tagline: Exceptional Pool Care for Southwest Florida

hero.headline:
Your Pool Deserves Southwest Florida's
Best Care
hero.subheadline: For 18 years, Marathon Pool Care has kept Fort Myers pools crystal clear and swim-ready. Our CPO-certified techs handle everything so you never worry about chemicals, equipment, or green water again -- just dive in.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> One Trusted Team
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to emergency repairs, Marathon Pool Care handles it all. Licensed, insured, and CPO-certified -- so you can stop worrying and start enjoying your backyard.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Cleaning & Maintenance
cards.description: Thorough weekly service including skimming, vacuuming, brushing, chemical balancing, and full equipment checks. Your pool stays pristine and swim-ready year-round in the Southwest Florida sun.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Replacement
cards.description: Expert diagnostics and repair of pumps, filters, heaters, LED lighting, and more. Most repairs completed same-visit with quality parts and honest pricing.

cards.title: Green Pool Clean-Up
cards.description: Neglected pool turned swamp green? Our specialized treatment restores even the worst algae situations to crystal-clear condition in 48-72 hours.

cards.title: Saltwater System Care
cards.description: Professional maintenance for saltwater chlorination systems including salt cell cleaning, calibration, and optimization for perfectly balanced water chemistry.

cards.title: Pool Inspections
cards.description: Comprehensive inspections covering equipment condition, structural integrity, safety compliance, and water quality. Ideal for home buyers or seasonal pool openings.

cards.title: Automation Setup
cards.description: Control your pool from your phone. We install and configure automation systems for pumps, lighting, heating, and water features -- modern convenience for your backyard.

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Assessment
steps.description: Call or text James directly. We'll discuss your pool's needs, visit your property, and provide an honest quote within 24 hours -- no pressure, no gimmicks.

steps.title: We Take It From Here
steps.description: Our CPO-certified technicians arrive on schedule every week. Cleaning, chemicals, equipment checks -- everything handled with precision and care.

steps.title: Relax and Enjoy Your Pool
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready every day. You'll get service updates after each visit, and James is always a call away if anything comes up.

about.label: Why Lee County Trusts Us
about.headline: Owner-Operated Pool Care That Goes the Extra Mile
about.description: Marathon Pool Care was founded in 2008 by James with a simple mission: deliver the kind of pool service he'd want for his own backyard. Eighteen years and 154 five-star reviews later, that commitment hasn't changed. Every technician is CPO-certified, every visit is thorough, and every customer gets James's personal cell number. We serve hundreds of pools across Fort Myers, Cape Coral, and Bonita Springs -- and we treat every single one like our own.

features.title: Licensed & CPO-Certified Team
features.description: Every technician holds a Certified Pool Operator credential and carries full liability insurance. Your pool is in expert hands.

features.title: No Contracts. No Surprises.
features.description: We earn your trust every visit. No long-term commitments, no cancellation fees -- just consistent, quality service you can count on.

features.title: Owner-Operated Accountability
features.description: James personally oversees every account. You deal directly with the owner -- not a call center. That's the Marathon difference.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. Zero Hidden Fees.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your pool. Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime -- we never lock you into contracts.

guarantee.headline: The Marathon Pool Care Promise
guarantee.description: If you're ever unsatisfied with a service visit, call James directly. We'll return within 24 hours and make it right at no extra charge. After 18 years serving Southwest Florida, our 4.9-star reputation is everything to us -- and we'll do whatever it takes to keep earning it.

faqs.question: How quickly can Marathon Pool Care start weekly service?
faqs.answer: Most new customers are scheduled within 3-5 business days. For green pool emergencies, we offer same-day or next-day response throughout Fort Myers, Cape Coral, and Bonita Springs. Just call James directly.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during my pool service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our customers provide gate access, and we handle everything while you're away. You'll receive a service summary after each visit so you always know what was done.

faqs.question: Are your technicians licensed and certified?
faqs.answer: Yes. Every Marathon Pool Care technician is CPO-certified (Certified Pool Operator), and our company holds a Florida Pool Contractor license. We're fully insured and bonded for your peace of mind.

faqs.question: What if I need to cancel my service?
faqs.answer: Cancel anytime with zero fees or penalties. We don't use contracts because we believe in earning your business every visit. Most of our customers have been with us for years -- that tells the story.

faqs.question: Do you work with saltwater pools and automation systems?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We specialize in saltwater chlorination systems and pool automation. From salt cell maintenance to setting up smartphone controls for your pumps and lighting, we've got you covered.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Weekly Customer
testimonials.text: Happy with the weekly service from Marathon Pools. James is professional, does thorough work, and is friendly. I totally recommend his company to service Florida pools.

testimonials.name: Long-Term Client
testimonials.text: We have been using James and the team at Marathon Pool Care for several years. Communication is professional and responsive, and we are always pleased with their level of service and affordability.

testimonials.name: Pool Repair Customer
testimonials.text: Whenever we experience a problem, James always returns our call and completes repairs quickly, reasonably, and with good cheer. Highly recommend Marathon Pool Care.

contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure pool assessment from James and the Marathon team. No contracts, no commitments -- just honest pricing from a company with 154 five-star reviews.
benefits: Free pool inspection with your quote
